entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A food legume (Cicer arietinum L.) affected by heat stress

entities.name: HEAT STRESS
entities.description: High temperatures, specifically >30°C and 32–35°C, affecting plant development

entities.name: ONTOGENY
entities.description: The developmental history of the chickpea plant

entities.name: ESCAPE MECHANISM
entities.description: A strategy used by chickpea to adapt to high temperatures

entities.name: REPRODUCTIVE DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The phase of plant growth involving flowering and seed production

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced, which can be reduced by heat stress

entities.name: POD SET
entities.description: The process of pod formation, affected by heat stress during the reproductive phase

entities.name: SEED SET
entities.description: The process of seed formation, affected by heat stress during the reproductive phase

entities.name: FLOWERING TIME
entities.description: The timing of flowering, which influences the impact of heat stress on yield

entities.name: FLORAL ORGAN ASYNCHRONY
entities.description: Lack of coordination in the development of male and female floral organs

entities.name: FLORAL ORGAN IMPAIRMENT
entities.description: Damage or dysfunction of male and female floral organs

entities.name: FIELD SCREENING
entities.description: A process used at ICRISAT to identify heat-tolerant germplasm

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The organization where field screening for heat-tolerant germplasm was conducted

entities.name: HEAT-TOLERANT GERMPLASM
entities.description: Genetic material that shows tolerance to high temperatures

entities.name: BREEDING PROGRAMS
entities.description: Systematic efforts to improve crop traits, such as heat tolerance

entities.name: HEAT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand high temperatures

entities.name: GENETIC IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of enhancing desirable traits in a crop through genetic means
